title: Insta485
points: Our very own Instagram clone — create an account, share your moments, connect with friends, and spread some likes! Give it a try now!

title: CrossyRoadPlayer
points: A powerful reinforcement learning agent built to conquer the thrilling world of Crossy Road!

title: Prediction of In-Hospital Mortality of Patients with Liver Cirrhosis
points: Incorporated a machine learning model for the classification of patients with liver cirrhosis and acute kidney injury based on their in-hospital mortality on the MIMIC-IV database using Google Cloud Platform.

title: VanillaDb
points: Improved the basic database systems with advanced indexing methods and speedup algorithms such as SIMD, achieving significant performance gains in throughput.

title: Chicken Run
points: Rabbit and Chicken are the best friends. One day, Rabbit got a bad score in a test. Rabbit was so sad and ran into the forest. Help Chicken find Rabbit and bring it back home!

title: Chicken Run 2
points: Rabbit was in a trouble again! Chicken wanted to save its friend from the aliens and needed your help! Help Chicken fight against its enemies!
